CVE-2019-14466.title: The GOsa_Filter_Settings cookie in GONICUS GOsa 2.7.5.2 is vulner ...
CVE-2019-14466.summary: The GOsa_Filter_Settings cookie in GONICUS GOsa 2.7.5.2 is vulnerable to PHP objection injection, which allows a remote authenticated attacker to perform file deletions (in the context of the user account that runs the web server) via a crafted cookie value, because unserialize is used to restore filter settings from a cookie.

CVE-2022-29221.title: Smarty is a template engine for PHP, facilitating the separation  ...
CVE-2022-29221.summary: Smarty is a template engine for PHP, facilitating the separation of presentation (HTML/CSS) from application logic. Prior to versions 3.1.45 and 4.1.1, template authors could inject php code by choosing a malicious {block} name or {include} file name. Sites that cannot fully trust template authors should upgrade to versions 3.1.45 or 4.1.1 to receive a patch for this issue. There are currently no known workarounds.
